title: Monte Carlo Monitors-as-Code
description: Schema for monitors.yml MaC configuration files. Validates field names and types only — cross-field semantic constraints (e.g. required field combinations, mutually exclusive options) are NOT checked here; those are enforced at apply time by the Monte Carlo backend.
